headline: Innovation as Growth Engine: How Colgate Plans to Revive Demand
summary: CL bets on science-led innovation, Colgate Total relaunch and AI-driven marketing to revive demand and boost premium growth across oral care and pet nutrition.

headline: Archer Daniels Balances Cost Cuts and Growth Investments: What's Next?
summary: ADM pursues a $500-$750M cost-cut plan while investing in nutrition, biosolutions and alternative proteins to counter softer commodity margins and drive long-term growth.
